'''Furi Nistola''' was a [[Planetary Governor/Legends|Planetary Governor]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He was given a [[RA-7 protocol droid/Legends|RA-7 protocol droid]] by [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor Palpatine]]. Once he learned of its spying abilities, he abandoned it and lied about how he lost it.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2006-06-27 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''
